items.title: BitAxe
items.description: BitAxe is an open-source, low-power Bitcoin ASIC miner designed for home mining. It bridges the gap between industrial-scale equipment and hobbyist participation in network security.

items.title: Home Mining
items.description: The practice of mining Bitcoin from a residence or small office using low-to-medium power hardware. Contrasts with industrial-scale mining in dedicated facilities. Home mining has seen a resurgence with the rise of efficient, quiet, open-source ASICs and hashrate marketplaces that let participants rent industrial-scale hash without owning hardware.

items.title: SatsCard
items.description: NFC-enabled physical card from Coinkite functioning like a re-usable OpenDime. Load bitcoin onto it and transfer via NFC tap.

items.title: Tapsigner
items.description: NFC-enabled card from Coinkite storing a Bitcoin private key. Sign transactions by tapping the card to your phone.
